name: AI Faces
description: Face-oriented AI capability contributions for image and video analysis.
author: Cove Team

tutorialTopics.title: AI Faces
tutorialTopics.description: Face detection, embeddings, clustering, and reference-pack matching.

slides.title: Review face identity evidence
slides.caption: AI Faces turns face detections and embeddings into reviewable identities, suggestions, and performer links.
slides.bodyMarkdown: Run face detection and embedding claims together, review suggestions before applying performer links, and use reference packs when you trust the source.
